verses.text: Hear, ye heads of Jacob; ought ye not to know judgment? Yet ye 'hate the good, and love the evil,' devouring my people. Cruel rulers. Leaders who should protect instead prey on the people.
Hear, ye heads of Jacob; ought ye not to know judgment? Yet ye 'hate the good, and love the evil,' devouring my people. Cruel rulers. Leaders who should protect instead prey on the people.
Hear, ye heads of Jacob; ought ye not to know judgment? Yet ye 'hate the good, and love the evil,' devouring my people. Cruel rulers. Leaders who should protect instead prey on the people.
Then they shall cry to the LORD, but He will not hear; the prophets cry 'Peace' while biting with their teeth. Mercenary lies. False prophets preach comfort to those who feed them.
Then they shall cry to the LORD, but He will not hear; the prophets cry 'Peace' while biting with their teeth. Mercenary lies. False prophets preach comfort to those who feed them.
Night shall fall on the seers, with no vision and no answer of God; they shall be ashamed. Light withdrawn. Those who misused God's word lose it utterly.
Night shall fall on the seers, with no vision and no answer of God; they shall be ashamed. Light withdrawn. Those who misused God's word lose it utterly.
But Micah is 'full of power by the spirit of the LORD,' to declare to Jacob his sin. True prophet. The faithful, filled with the Spirit, speak the truth that others fear.
But Micah is 'full of power by the spirit of the LORD,' to declare to Jacob his sin. True prophet. The faithful, filled with the Spirit, speak the truth that others fear.
They build Zion with blood, the priests teach for hire, yet lean on the LORD; so 'Zion... shall be plowed as a field.' Empty presumption. To sin while claiming God's favour brings sure ruin.
